view: N13 next-cohort — the alpha-decay CHAIN of N12's top island candidates (298-120 = composite 0.545 top, 296-120). N11/N12 scored only the Z=119/120 PARENTS; N13 maps the chain DAUGHTERS (Z=110-118) an accelerator must pre-characterise for alpha-chain CORRELATION TAGGING of a Z=120 recoil. ALL Q_alpha MEASURED (AME2020 / experimental) — strictly more rigorous than N12's predicted WS4 inputs. These are CONFIRMED nuclei: scoring = funnel calibration + alpha-tag landscape, NEVER a new-element discovery. Sibling of n12_funnel/.../top_k_next.json (kept intact).
novel_element_funnel_top: 298-120 (N12, composite 0.545) — N13 chain daughters all rank BELOW it (lighter -> lower island_weight). N12 top stands as the overall novel-element funnel headline.
honest_skipped: Z=119/120 PARENT cells N12 missed (294/298/301-119, 293/294-120): WS4/KTUY Q_alpha in arxiv:1706.04068 / 2403.02748 are figure-locked (scatter-plot coords; no extractable decimal across the open sources reachable this session). NOT fabricated -> honest-skip until a cited decimal is in hand (@D d6). Out-of-reach != impossible (@D d2).
Z=121, Z=122: no cited Q_alpha anywhere (arxiv:2402.11514 Skyrme table ends at Z=120, confirmed by N12) -> permanent honest-skip (@D d6).
N=183/184-region: WS4 table ends N=182 (302-120, N12); no cited island-center Q_alpha -> skip (no fabrication of the island value).
rank_formula: composite = c_total_score (window score on C1 alpha+SF log10 T_total) x island_weight (2-D Gaussian magic-number proximity, sigma=6). Identical scorer to N11 G4 / N12 (n11_island_cell_checked).
verify_status: Closed-form kernels (NC1 Viola-Seaborg, NC2 Royer, C1 Ren-Xu/ZWP SF) reproduce U-238 (17.4493 vs +17.4) and Og-294 (-2.93088 vs -2.93) anchors VERBATIM via test/nuclear_r4_anchor_smoke.hexa (4/4 PASS, run on mini 2026-05-28, hexa-lang e8aac4195). Og-294 anchor = N13 cell 294-Og. R4 intact (7 absorbed=false literals, 0 absorbed=true). `hexa verify --expr` re-registration BLOCKED: verify_cli.hexa clang '_bessel_j1' duplicate-symbol codegen bug (hexa-lang INBOX #2002, pre-existing, unrelated). Smoke-test anchor reproduction IS the green closure (g5, as N12 did).

top_k_candidates.name: 292-Lv
top_k_candidates.note: N13 TOP. 296-120 chain alpha-tag anchor. Highest in-band c_total (log10 T_total -1.69 s). sf_model_invalid=true -> alpha-only total used as prediction. Below N12 298-120 (0.545).

top_k_candidates.name: 294-Og
top_k_candidates.note: Smoke-test anchor cell (Og-294, smoke log10 T -2.93 reproduced). Direct alpha-daughter of 298-120 (N12 top) -> FIRST alpha-tag step of a 298-120 recoil chain. alpha-dominant b=0.74.

top_k_candidates.name: 288-Fl
top_k_candidates.note: 296-120 chain (via 292-Lv). Longest in-band half-life of the cohort (log10 T_total -0.39 s). sf_model_invalid=true -> alpha-only total (prediction).

top_k_candidates.name: 293-Og
top_k_candidates.note: Neutron-rich Og neighbour. alpha-dominant (b=1.0). odd-A hindrance not modeled -> composite is an honest hindrance-uncaptured signal, NOT a collapse (@D d2).

top_k_candidates.name: 286-Fl
top_k_candidates.note: 298-120 chain. High c_total but low island_weight (far from N=184·Z=120 corner) -> mid composite. sf_model_invalid=true -> alpha-only total (prediction).

top_k_candidates.name: 282-Cn
top_k_candidates.verdict_tier: CLOSED-NEGATIVE (composite=0; in-model SF-collapse, b_alpha~0, log10 T_total -13.99 s below band)
top_k_candidates.note: CLOSED-NEGATIVE (g63). 298-120 chain. Genuine in-model SF-collapse (Ren-Xu valid, sf_model_invalid=false). REPRODUCES the MEASURED behaviour: real 282-Cn T½~0.8 ms by SF. KEPT, not skipped. Strong calibration result.

top_k_candidates.name: 284-Cn
top_k_candidates.verdict_tier: CLOSED-NEGATIVE (composite=0; in-model SF-collapse, b_alpha~0, log10 T_total -23.03 s below band)
top_k_candidates.note: CLOSED-NEGATIVE (g63). 296-120 chain. Genuine in-model SF-collapse. REPRODUCES the MEASURED behaviour: real 284-Cn T½~100 ms, SF-dominant. KEPT. Calibration result.

top_k_candidates.name: 278-Ds
top_k_candidates.verdict_tier: CLOSED-NEGATIVE (composite=0; in-model SF-collapse, b_alpha~0, log10 T_total -15.12 s below band)
top_k_candidates.note: CLOSED-NEGATIVE (g63). 298-120 chain terminus (great-great-granddaughter). Genuine in-model SF-collapse. REPRODUCES real 278-Ds short T½ (SF/alpha). KEPT. Calibration.

scope_caveats: (s1) CALIBRATION-VIEW: every N13 cell is a CONFIRMED nucleus with MEASURED Q_alpha (predicted_input=false). The funnel reproducing their known decay behaviour (esp. the 3 SF-collapse CLOSED-NEGATIVEs matching measured SF half-lives of 282-Cn/284-Cn/278-Ds) is a CALIBRATION result, NOT a discovery. The novel-element funnel target stays Z=119/120 (N12).

(s2) Q_alpha MEASURED but model-scatter exists even on confirmed cells (294-Og: AME 11.82 vs exp 11.65 vs chemlin 11.867 ~0.2 MeV). Values used are AME2020-evaluated mid-band. @D d6: no forced number.

(s3) 4 even-A chain cells carry sf_model_invalid=true (Ren-Xu out-of-domain guard -> alpha-only total used as PREDICTION); 1 odd-A cell (293-Og) carries hindrance-not-modeled. A low composite there is an honest model-limit signal, NOT a true collapse. The 3 genuine CLOSED-NEGATIVEs (282-Cn, 284-Cn, 278-Ds) have sf_model_invalid=false (in-model SF-collapse).

(s4) absorbed=false 영구 (R4). N13 cells are CONFIRMED nuclei (not new elements). 2026-05 현재 Z=119/120 confirmed discovery 0건. This is an accelerator alpha-chain-TAG priority hint (which daughters to expect when tagging a Z=120 recoil), never a discovery. (e)-gate detection (DGFRS-2/GARIS-III) is permanently wet-lab-dependent.
citations: arxiv:1811.00427 — Olsen & Nazarewicz, Alpha Decay Energies of Superheavy Nuclei: Systematic Trends (computes the 296-120 + 298-120 alpha-decay chains; basis for the N13 chain selection)
arxiv:1706.04068 — WS4/KTUY Q_alpha for Z=119/120 parents (figure-locked -> parent cells honest-skipped)
arxiv:2506.02684 — Deformed magic N=178 Z=120 (basis for 298-120, the N12 top whose chain N13 maps)
AME2020 atomic mass evaluation + NUBASE2020 (measured Q_alpha / half-lives of the confirmed chain members)
Viola-Seaborg 1966 (NC1) · Royer 2000 (NC2) · Ren-Xu PRC71 014309 2005 + Hoffman 1993 + Zdeb-Warda-Pomorski 2013 (C1 SF kernels)
recommendation: N13 alpha-chain-tag landscape for the N12 top island candidate. TOP: 292-Lv (composite 0.3725, 296-120 chain anchor) > 294-Og (0.2199, the FIRST alpha-tag step of a 298-120 recoil, smoke-anchor cell). All N13 chain daughters rank BELOW N12 298-120 (0.545) -> the Z=120 PARENT remains the overall novel-element funnel top. 3 CLOSED-NEGATIVE (282-Cn, 284-Cn, 278-Ds) reproduce the MEASURED SF-collapse of those confirmed nuclei = calibration validation. absorbed=false 영구 — these are confirmed nuclei (calibration), and a NEW Z=119/120 element requires GSI/JINR/RIKEN beam + DGFRS/GARIS detection + IUPAC priority. '가능성' != '임'.
